events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Scenario: field service, installed operating asset, Piping & Plumbing, Material transitions. Observed field condition: no dielectric union copper-to-steel. Work rough-complete. Need identify component/condition and visible defect cues. Decision fail because non-compliant/dangerous? Risk high? galvanic corrosion, leaks. Component condition installed-defective, non-compliant. percent_complete maybe 80? value 0. sound_source irrelevant. confidence 1. event_time 0 rate 0. order empty. workable empty. findings: missing dielectric union/isolation between dissimilar metals copper and steel; galvanic corrosion risk. actions: install approved dielectric union or isolation fitting per IPC/manufacturer. rationale: direct copper-to-steel connection causes galvanic corrosion, violates IPC and OEM listings; must isolate dissimilar metals. references: IPC (e.g., IPC 605? Actually IPC maybe International Plumbing Code 2018 Section 605 Materials, 605.16? Need approximate. IPC 605.16? Let's recall IPC sections: 605.16 Joints between different materials? Actually IPC 2018 Section 605.16 "Dissimilar metals" maybe requires dielectric fittings. Let's search memory: IPC 2018 Section 605.16 "Joints between dissimilar metals" states a dielectric fitting or other approved insulating device shall be used where connection is made between dissimilar metal piping. Also 605.16.1 Dielectric fittings. Manufacturer listings. So reference IPC 605.16, mfr listings. Need JSON only. Ensure valid JSON.

  "actions": [
    "Install an approved dielectric union or dielectric fitting at the copper-to-steel transition",

    "Re-inspect and pressure-test the assembly after correction"
  ],
  "rationale": "A direct copper-to-steel connection creates a galvanic couple that accelerates corrosion and can cause premature failure or leakage. The IPC and manufacturer listings require an approved dielectric separation between dissimilar metals, so the installation is non-compliant and defective.",

    "IPC 605.16 - Joints between dissimilar metals",
